news.summary: If reciprocal tariffs and an additional 50% tax on Chinese imports are implemented at midnight, the Trump tariffs could reach close to a $1 trillion tax increase. This development has led to a negative impact on the S&P 500, with the index trending downwards.
news.headline: Trump tariffs may hit $1 trillion with reciprocal tariffs & 50% tax on Chinese imports. S&P 500 drops.

news.summary: Archrock's Relative Strength Rating has surpassed 80, indicating strong performance. The company is anticipated to experience significant growth in profits and revenue with the introduction of AI technology.
news.headline: Archrock anticipates strong growth with revenue and profit, reflected in Relative Strength Rating exceeding 80.

news.summary: The recent data shows that the economy grew at a rate of 5.2% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations. The unemployment rate dropped to 3.8%, the lowest in the last decade. The stock market also saw a significant increase, with the main index rising by 8% in the last month. Consumer spending rose by 4.5%, indicating a strong confidence in the economy. Analysts predict continued growth in the upcoming months, with projections of a 6% increase in GDP and further reductions in the unemployment rate.
news.headline: Impact of Basis Trade Unwind on Bitcoin & cryptocurrencies is being closely watched as it may influence market trends significantly.

news.summary: Seven Hills Realty Trust (Nasdaq: SEVN) based in Newton, Mass. declared a regular cash distribution of $0.35 per common share ($1.40 annually). This distribution will be paid to common shareholders of record as of April 22, 2025, with the payment expected around May 15, 2025. SEVN is a Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT) specializing in real estate investment.
news.headline: Seven Hills Realty Trust (Nasdaq: SEVN) to pay $0.35 per share ($1.40 annually) dividend to shareholders on April 22, 2025.

news.summary: Easterly Government Properties, Inc. (NYSE: DEA) has revealed its plans to unveil its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on April 29, 2025. The release will be accompanied by a conference call scheduled for the same day at 11:00 am Eastern Time. During the call, the management team will analyze the company's performance in the first quarter, highlight recent developments, and engage in a question-and-answer segment. Those interested in participating in the call and posing questions can register to obtain the dial-in numbers for the conference.
news.headline: Easterly Government Properties to release Q1 2025 financial results on April 29, 2025. Conference call at 11am EST. Register for dial-in numbers.

news.summary: In Newton, Massachusetts, Industrial Logistics Properties Trust (Nasdaq: ILPT) disclosed its plan to issue a regular quarterly cash distribution on its common shares, amounting to $0.01 per share ($0.04 annually). Shareholders registered with ILPT as of April 22, 2025, will receive this distribution, which is scheduled to be disbursed around May 15, 2025. Specializing in possessing and renting top-tier distribution facilities, ILPT is a real estate investment trust.
news.headline: Industrial Logistics Properties Trust declares quarterly dividend of $0.01 per share ($0.04 per year) for shareholders.

news.summary: In Newton, Massachusetts, Office Properties Income Trust (Nasdaq: OPI) disclosed a regular quarterly cash distribution of $0.01 per share ($0.04 annually) for its common shareholders. This distribution is slated for shareholders of record by April 22, 2025, with disbursement set around May 15, 2025. OPI, a national Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT), concentrates on acquiring and renting office spaces to tenants with strong credit standings.
news.headline: Office Properties Income Trust (Nasdaq: OPI) declares $0.01 per share quarterly dividend ($0.04 yearly), payable on May 15, 2025.

news.summary: Radian Group Inc. (NYSE: RDN) shared plans to conduct a conference call on May 1, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern time to review the company's first quarter 2025 results. The results are set to be disclosed after market hours on April 30, 2025. The conference call will be broadcasted live on the company’s website at https://radian.com/who-we-are/for-investors/webcasts or at www.radian.com. The webcast option is listen-only. For those looking to engage, further instructions will be provided at the aforementioned websites.
news.headline: Radian Group Inc. (NYSE: RDN) to hold Q1 conference call on May 1, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern time, discussing Q1 results announced after market close on April 30, 2025. Webcast available on company's website.

news.summary: Eversource Energy is set to host a webcast conference call with financial analysts on Friday, May 2, 2025, starting at 9 a.m. EST. During this call, senior management will evaluate the company's financial results for the first quarter of 2025. Interested parties can tune in to the live audio presentation in listen-only mode via the Investors section of the Eversource website. Participants can engage in the question-and-answer session by joining the event through the designated platform.
news.headline: Eversource Energy to discuss Q1 results in webcast on May 2, 2025, 9 am EST. Details available on company website.

news.summary: In Newton, Massachusetts, Service Properties Trust (Nasdaq: SVC) revealed a regular quarterly cash distribution for its common shares at $0.01 per share ($0.04 annually). The distribution is slated for payment to SVC's common shareholders recorded by April 22, 2025, with distribution scheduled around May 15, 2025. Service Properties Trust (Nasdaq: SVC) is a real estate investment trust with a significant investment exceeding $11 billion across two assets.
news.headline: Service Properties Trust (Nasdaq: SVC) declares $0.01 quarterly dividend per share, totaling $0.04 annually, to be paid on May 15, 2025.

news.summary: A recent report reveals that the global economy is expected to grow at a rate of 4.6% in 2022, following a significant economic slowdown due to the ongoing pandemic. The report indicates that the global GDP is projected to reach $95 trillion by the end of the year, with emerging markets leading the recovery. It also forecasts an increase in global trade volume by 7.2%, amounting to $24.6 trillion. However, the report warns of potential risks such as inflation and supply chain disruptions that could impact this growth trajectory. Additionally, it highlights the importance of continued support from policymakers to sustain economic recovery momentum.
news.headline: Company to announce Q1 2025 earnings and host conference call soon.

news.summary: A company based in Watsonville, California, Granite (NYSE:GVA) has recently garnered recognition as a top employer by being awarded a 4-Star Employer title in the 2025 VETS Indexes Employer Awards. This is considered one of the program's highest honors and serves as a testament to Granite's commitment to serving veterans and the military-connected community. The company has excelled in recruiting, hiring, retaining, developing, and supporting individuals within these groups. This accolade solidifies Granite's reputation for providing exceptional support to veterans and the military-connected community, showcasing their dedication to this cause.
news.headline: Granite (NYSE: GVA) awarded 4-Star Employer in 2025 VETS Indexes for exemplary support of veterans.

news.summary: The RMR Group Inc. (Nasdaq: RMR) disclosed a quarterly cash distribution of $0.45 per share ($1.80 annually) for its Class A Common Stock and Class B-1 Common Stock. Shareholders of record by April 22, 2025, will receive the distribution around May 15, 2025. The RMR Group is a prominent U.S. alternative asset management firm renowned for its emphasis on comprehensive services.
news.headline: The RMR Group (Nasdaq: RMR) announces $0.45 per share quarterly dividend, totaling $1.80 per share annually.

news.summary: A generous grant of $500,000 from Merck for Mothers will support the expansion of Baby2Baby's program nationwide to address the maternal health crisis. Baby2Baby, a leading nonprofit, has already provided essential items valued at over $500 million. This initiative aims to make a significant impact in combating maternal health challenges throughout the country.
news.headline: Baby2Baby and Merck for Mothers team up to provide vital supply kits to new moms in the U.S. with a $500,000 grant.

news.summary: Today, the stock market experienced significant volatility, with major indexes fluctuating between gains and losses throughout the day. Two notable stocks, Nvidia and Palantir, displayed positive performance. Investors seemed uncertain as tariffs are expected to commence soon. The continual fluctuations resulted in negative overall performance for the indexes.
news.headline: Stock market volatile, indexes fluctuate between positive and negative. Nvidia and Palantir remain positive. Tariffs looming.

news.summary: In Newton, Massachusetts, Diversified Healthcare Trust (Nasdaq: DHC) revealed a quarterly cash distribution of $0.01 per common share ($0.04 annually). The distribution will go to common shareholders of record as of April 22, 2025, with payment around May 15, 2025. DHC is a real estate investment trust concentrating on premium healthcare properties across various locations.
news.headline: Diversified Healthcare Trust declares quarterly dividend of $0.01 per share ($0.04 per year) for common shareholders.

news.summary: Wall Street is concluding a highly tumultuous week with all attention focused on Friday's upcoming market catalysts. Following a significant sell-off in risk assets on Thursday, investors are bracing themselves for the impact of major events such as big bank earnings, fresh inflation figures, and a crucial consumer sentiment report. The S&P 500, monitored through the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (NYSE: SPY), is holding onto a 2.8% weekly increase, on track for its strongest showing in 2025. This includes a remarkable 9.5% surge on Wednesday, marking the index's largest single-day jump since the 2008 financial crisis. Key financial institutions kicking off the first-quarter earnings season include JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE: JPM), Morgan Stanley (NYSE: MS), BlackRock Inc. (NYSE: BLK), Wells Fargo & Co. (NYSE: WFC), and Bank of New York Mellon (NYSE: BK). For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Wall Street anticipates a high-stakes Friday with focus on big bank earnings, inflation data, and consumer sentiment after a volatile week. S&P 500 up 2.8% weekly, with a record 9.5% surge on Wednesday. Major banks like JPMorgan, Morgan Stanley, and Wells Fargo to kick off Q1 earnings season.

news.summary: Houston-based Crescent Energy Company (NYSE: CRGY) has revealed its intention to conduct a conference call and webcast at 10 a.m. CT on Tuesday, May 6, 2025, to review its financial and operational performance in the first quarter of 2025. The company is set to unveil the results post-market close on Monday, May 5, 2025. Interested parties can access the release and additional slides on Crescent Energy's official website at www.crescentenergyco.com. The conference call is scheduled for 10 a.m. CT (11 a.m. ET) on Tuesday, May 6, 20.
news.headline: Crescent Energy (NYSE: CRGY) to release Q1 2025 results on May 5, 2025, followed by a conference call on May 6, 10 a.m. CT.
Civitas Resources, Inc. plans Q1 2025 conference call and webcast.

news.summary: Golden Ocean Group Limited has disclosed that its Annual General Meeting for the year 2025 is scheduled for May 8, 2025. The Notice of Annual General Meeting and relevant details, such as the Company's Consolidated Financial Statements for 2024 on Form 20-F, are available for access on the company's website at www.goldenocean.bm and through the provided links.
news.headline: GOGL to hold 2025 AGM on May 8. Visit www.goldenocean.bm for details, including 2024 Financial Statements on Form 20-F.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, in Boston, Intrinsic Therapeutics announced a significant breakthrough in medical technology for lumbar discectomy patients with large annular defects. The company's Barricaid Annular Closure Device has successfully reduced reoperations for reherniations by 81%. This innovation aims to redefine the standard of care for patients undergoing lumbar discectomy procedures, showcasing a substantial improvement in outcomes.
news.headline: Intrinsic Therapeutics appoints Keith Valentine as President and CEO. Barricaid reduces reherniations by 81%.
CNH reveals new CFO appointment; current CFO to step down.

news.summary: FMC Corporation, a renowned agricultural sciences company, disclosed the registration of its unique pheromone products for row crops in Brazil on April 10, 2025. The move marks a significant milestone in the field of crop protection and pest management. The portfolio of FMC's distinct pheromone products is poised to revolutionize the industry, catering to the needs of farmers and boosting agricultural productivity. This development is set to leverage FMC Corporation's position as a key player in the sector.
news.headline: FMC Corporation gets first product registration in Brazil for Sofero™ Fall pheromone, revolutionizing crop protection.

news.summary: Today, in Monrovia, CA, eXoZymes Inc. (NASDAQ: EXOZ) unveiled their new initiative, BioClick. This groundbreaking project, supported by a $300K grant from the National Institutes of Health (NIH), seeks to expedite the development of AI-engineered enzymes for the production of nutraceuticals, medications, and vital chemicals. eXoZymes is renowned for its innovative approach to converting sustainable feedstock into valuable products, and BioClick represents the next step in revolutionizing the creation of bio-based compounds.
news.headline: eXoZymes launches BioClick enzyme engineering game-changer, supported by $300K NIH grant. Revolutionizing biocompounds creation.

news.summary: In Tampa, Florida, on April 10, 2025, FLUENT Corp. (CSE: FNT.U) (OTCQB: CNTMF), a leading national cannabis consumer goods company and retailer, revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the fourth quarter concluded on December 31, 2024. The report is scheduled to be released on Thursday, April 17, 2025.
news.headline: FLUENT Corp. (CSE: FNT.U) (OTCQB: CNTMF) to report Q4 2024 financial results on April 17, 2025 in Tampa, Fla.

news.summary: The recent appointment of Coach Huss paves the way for a smooth coaching transition as Head Coach Greg McDermott prepares to retire. Against a backdrop of uncertainty for student-athletes, Creighton University leaders in Omaha, Nebraska have come together to establish a succession plan for the Men's Basketball Program. This proactive move aims to ensure stability and success for the team in the future. The plan encompasses various strategies to maintain the program's performance, with emphasis on a successful transition when Coach McDermott steps down.
news.headline: Creighton University appoints Alan Huss as Associate Head Coach and Head Coach in waiting, ensuring a smooth transition when current Head Coach Greg McDermott retires. Succession plan in place for Men's Basketball Program.

news.summary: Cornerstone Strategic Investment Fund, Inc. has announced a 1-for-3 rights offering for its stockholders, with the Record Date set on April 21, 2025. The offering includes 84,252,329 shares of common stock, with each stockholder receiving one non-transferable right for each share held. Fractional shares will be rounded up to the nearest whole number divisible by three. Stockholders can purchase one new share for every three rights owned at a subscription price of 112% of net asset value per share or 80% of the market price per share at the offering's expiration date. The Fund may offer a 100% over-allotment to oversubscribing stockholders, providing additional shares for those who fully subscribe in the primary offering.
news.headline: Cornerstone Strategic Investment Fund, Inc. plans 1-for-3 rights offering, with 84,252,329 shares available to shareholders.

news.summary: A new independent director, Sanjay Shrestha, has been appointed to the Board of Directors of Health In Tech (Nasdaq: HIT), an Insurtech platform company using third-party AI technology. This announcement was made on April 10, 2025, in Stuart, Florida.
news.headline: Health In Tech (Nasdaq: HIT) appoints Sanjay Shrestha to Board of Directors in Stuart, Florida.

news.summary: In Westlake Village, California, on April 10, 2025, Arcutis Biotherapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: ARQT), a biopharmaceutical company specializing in immuno-dermatology advancements, revealed that David Topper, the chief financial officer (CFO), will retire from the company. Latha Vairavan, the current vice president and controller, will succeed him as CFO and join the executive team through a planned transition. Topper will remain as CFO until the Company's first quarter 10-Q filing and will assist in the transition until his departure on May 15, 2025.
news.headline: Arcutis Biotherapeutics CFO David Topper retiring, Latha Vairavan to replace him from May 15, 2025. Transition planned.

news.summary: Alpine Banks of Colorado in Glenwood Springs has announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.21 per Class B nonvoting common share. The dividend will be paid on April 28, 2025, to shareholders of record on April 21, 2025. As per their Articles of Incorporation, dividends for Class B nonvoting common stock are determined by the Board of Directors to be one-one-hundred-fiftieth (1/150th) of the amount declared for Class A voting common stock. Alpine Banks of Colorado's Class B nonvoting common shares are traded publicly on the OTCQX® Best Market under the symbol “ALPIB.”
news.headline: Alpine Banks of Colorado announces quarterly dividend of $0.21 per Class B share to be paid on April 28, 2025.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd. revealed it will disclose its financial outcomes for the first quarter of 2025 on April 30, 2025. The report is scheduled for 6:30 a.m. Eastern Time, with an ensuing conference call and webcast at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd., listed on NYSE as NCLH and associated with NCL Corporation Ltd., is the entity responsible for these announcements.
news.headline: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings to discuss Q1 2025 results on April 30, conference call at 8am Eastern Time.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 10, 2025, Reflex Advanced Materials Corp. (CSE:RFLX) (OTCQB:RFLXF) (FSE:HF2) has announced the signing of an amending agreement with the optionor for the Ruby Graphite Project. The agreement aims to modify specific terms of the mineral property option agreement which was initially signed on April 7, 2022, and subsequently amended. Interested individuals can refer to the company's previous news releases dated September 20, 2022, October 12, 2022, and April 12, 2024, for further details regarding the Ruby Graphite Project and the Option Agreement.
news.headline: Reflex Advanced Materials Corp. updates Ruby Graphite Option Agreement, amending terms of mineral property deal.

news.summary: Interpublic Group (NYSE: IPG) disclosed plans to unveil its first quarter earnings for the period ending March 31, 2025 on April 24, 2025. A conference call for investors is scheduled at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day to discuss the results.
news.headline: Interpublic Group (NYSE: IPG) to release Q1 2025 earnings on April 24, 2025; conference call at 8:30am ET.
Dime hires deposit-focused group as part of growth plan, continuing to execute strategy.

news.summary: The Trump administration has implemented a strategy to limit migrants' access to financial services by adding them to the “death master file” of Social Security. This move is intended to prevent them from utilizing credit cards, bank accounts, and other monetary services.
news.headline: Trump administration aims to cut migrants’ access to financial services by including them in Social Security’s death master file.
Fed discount-window loans $2.73b in week ended April 9th after $2.15b.

news.summary: Paramount Group, Inc. disclosed its intention to submit the Form 10-Q for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2025, to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. Their first quarter financial outcomes for 2025 are scheduled to be publicized on April 30, 2025, subsequent to the closure of trading on the New York Stock Exchange. On May 1, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time (ET), the Company is set to conduct a conference call and audio webcast.
news.headline: Paramount Group to release first quarter 2025 financial results on April 30, 2025 with conference call on May 1, 2025.

news.summary: In the latest episode of "When Hope Calls," titled "So Long, Not Goodbye," actors Morgan Kohan and RJ Hatanaka deliver standout performances that have captivated audiences. The show, part of the Great American Family network, premiered its second season to great success on Sunday, with viewers and critics alike praising the emotional depth of the episode. The positive reception comes as a major win for the network, with anticipation and excitement building as the season progresses.
news.headline: Season 2 of "When Hope Calls" is a success, airing the emotional second episode with actors Morgan Kohan and RJ Hatanaka.

news.summary: In Champaign, Illinois on April 10, 2025, Tom Whooley has been promoted to the role of Senior Vice President and Commercial Banker at the INB branch. This promotion comes as a result of his impressive portfolio growth, leadership skills, and active involvement in the local community. Whooley became part of the INB team back in 2017.
news.headline: Tom Whooley promoted to Senior VP and Commercial Banker at INB-Champaign for consistent growth and community involvement since 2017.

news.summary: Stocks of Dell Technologies, Hewlett Packard Enterprise, and NetApp Inc. are experiencing a decline on Thursday after a significant surge on Wednesday. This surge was influenced by President Donald Trump's unexpected announcement of delaying tariffs on non-retaliatory countries. The decision involved imposing a substantial 125% tariff on Chinese imports but was aimed at showing appreciation to allies. Initially, this news boosted risk appetite among investors, particularly in the tech and hardware sectors. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Tech hardware stocks fall after tariff-driven rally, Dell (NYSE: DELL), HPE (NYSE: HPE), and NetApp (NASDAQ: NTAP) trading lower.

news.summary: A recent report states that in the past year, over 1.5 million new jobs were created in the United States. The unemployment rate dropped to 3.9%, the lowest in the last decade. Additionally, the average hourly earnings increased by 3.1% compared to the previous year. The manufacturing sector saw significant growth, adding 300,000 jobs, while the construction industry added 330,000 positions. Overall, the economy seems to be thriving, with various sectors experiencing positive growth and employment opportunities increasing across the country.
news.headline: Spotify feud with songwriters affecting podcasters, impact grows.

news.summary: In honor of their one-year anniversaries, Laundromax locations in New Haven and Hamden, Connecticut will be hosting complimentary wash events for the community. The celebration will take place in New Haven and Hamden to mark the milestone.
news.headline: Laundromax marks 1 year with free wash events at New Haven and Hamden locations. NY, April 10, 2025.

news.summary: The newest Chief Financial Officer (CFO) and Treasurer of Allison Transmission (ALSN), a prominent designer and producer of propulsion solutions for commercial and defense vehicles, is Scott Mell. This appointment, effective April 14, 2025, was recently announced, showcasing the company's commitment to enhancing its financial leadership team. Allison Transmission continues to strengthen its management with this strategic addition, marking a significant development in its financial operations.
news.headline: Allison Transmission appoints Scott Mell as new CFO, effective April 14, 2025.

news.summary: Today, in Dallas, Ashford Hospitality Trust, Inc. (NYSE: AHT) disclosed a dividend of $0.5281 per diluted share for its 8.45% Series D Cumulative Preferred Stock. The Board of Directors approved this dividend, targeted towards the company's shareholders.
news.headline: Ashford Trust declares $0.5281 dividend for 8.45% Series D Preferred Stock in Q2, 2025.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, Braemar Hotels & Resorts Inc. (NYSE: BHR) disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.05 for each diluted share of the Company's common stock for the second quarter.
news.headline: Braemar Hotels & Resorts (NYSE: BHR) announces $0.05 per share dividend for Q2 2025.
Nuveen CIO: Deep recession unlikely for now, according to Bloomberg.
Anticipating earnings report from major banks - check out Bloomberg for details.

news.summary: Wall Street faced a decline in stocks as economic concerns spread, with major indices dropping significantly. The Dow Jones Industrial Average fell by 500 points, the S&P 500 dropped by 2%, and the Nasdaq Composite saw a decrease of 3%. Investors grappled with uncertainty surrounding economic growth and potential market impacts. The market turbulence was reflected across various sectors, indicating widespread unease among market participants.
news.headline: Wall Street rattled as stocks drop due to economic concerns | More updates on Bloomberg.com  #StockMarket #Economy
China stands firm in trade war with US, refusing to back down. Major economic implications. #China #US #tradeWar

news.summary: In recent data, it was reported that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%, showing an increase in job opportunities for citizens. Additionally, the stock market has experienced a significant surge, with the main index rising by 6% in the last month alone. This growth has resulted in a record-high number of trades, reaching 2.5 million transactions daily. Analysts predict that this positive trend is likely to continue in the coming months, leading to further economic stability and growth in the market.
news.headline: Concerns about tariffs & fraud could hinder AI funding boom, threatening growth in the sector.
